proposed_relations.description: Off-board fare collection implemented on 34th Street as part of the SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: Since last fall, DOT & NYCT have ... – Implemented off-board fare collection – Completed environmental review – Released the Project Analysis Report – Initiated design work of the project

decisions.rationale: Block p003_c0002 is in the 'Project Update' section of the 34th Street SBS presentation and explicitly states off-board fare collection was implemented as part of the project. The project_34th-st-sbs-2012 record lists this source and describes the project as including off-board fare collection.

proposed_relations.description: MTA Bus Time real-time bus location system implemented on M34 as part of the 34th Street SBS project

evidence_refs.source_quote: Real time bus location information system • Implemented on M34, with expansion citywide

decisions.rationale: Block p005_c0002 appears under the 'MTA Bus Time' heading within the 34th Street SBS presentation, explicitly stating the system was 'Implemented on M34'. The M34 is the 34th Street bus route which the SBS project serves. The project_34th-st-sbs-2012 record includes this source.
